description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist black-and-white color scheme. The front features large rectangular windows and a covered carport with a visible parked car. The property is enclosed by a low hedge, and the backyard includes a swimming pool, sun loungers, and a shaded outdoor dining area. The side view reveals an exterior staircase leading to the upper floor, and the landscaping includes a tree and manicured bushes. The house has clean lines, a boxy structure, and an open, functional outdoor space. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, geometric forms, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, two-story black-and-white house with a flat roof, large windows, a carport, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a carport with a car underneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the exterior staircase, carport, and the pool area with sun loungers and hedges.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, outdoor dining area, and a tree within the enclosed hedge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid black wall, carport roof, and a portion of the landscaped yard with loungers and a fire pit.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, small steps, and a covered carport; minimal decorative elements.
